ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., J4, J6) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., Children, Women, Men) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for children's sizes */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the size is applicable */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicate if the size is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "hollow_to_hem" REAL /* Hollow to hem measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "outseam" REAL /* Outseam measurement in inches */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "neck" REAL /* Neck measurement in inches */,
  "armhole" REAL /* Armhole measurement in inches */,
  "thigh" REAL /* Thigh measurement in inches */,
  "cuff" REAL /* Cuff measurement in inches */,
  "rise" REAL /* Rise measurement in inches */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_to_hem" REAL /* Shoulder to hem measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_to_sleeve_hem" REAL /* Shoulder to sleeve hem measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., Women, Men, Children) */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the size chart is applicable */,
  "chart_url" TEXT /* URL to the size chart image */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicate if the chart is the default for the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_type FOREIGN KEY ("size_type") REFERENCES sizes ("size_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "fabric_types" (
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fabric type */,
  "fabric_name" TEXT /* Name of the fabric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fabric characteristics */,
  "material_composition" TEXT /* Composition of the fabric (e.g., 100% Cotton, 60% Polyester, 40% Cotton) */,
  "care_level" TEXT /* Care level of the fabric (e.g., Easy, Moderate, High) */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the fabric (e.g., USA, China) */,
  "is_sustainable" INTEGER /* Indicate if the fabric is sustainable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fabric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing style (e.g., Casual, Formal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the style (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the style is suitable (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Indicate if the style is customizable */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the style image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "care_instructions" (
  "instruction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each care instruction entry */,
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fabric type */,
  "washing_method" TEXT /* Recommended washing method (e.g., machine wash, hand wash) */,
  "drying_method" TEXT /* Recommended drying method (e.g., tumble dry, air dry) */,
  "ironing_method" TEXT /* Recommended ironing method (e.g., low heat, do not iron) */,
  "bleaching_method" TEXT /* Recommended bleaching method (e.g., Non-chlorine bleach, No bleach) */,
  "ironing_temperature" TEXT /* Recommended ironing temperature (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "dry_cleaning_method" TEXT /* Recommended dry cleaning method (e.g., Dry clean only, Do not dry clean) */,
  "storage_instructions" TEXT /* Storage instructions for the fabric (e.g., Store in a cool, dry place) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instruction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style */,
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fabric type */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Available quantity in stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Selling price of the item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the item */,
  "stock_location" TEXT /* Location where the item is stocked */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level to trigger a restock */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date when the stock was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_fabric_id FOREIGN KEY ("fabric_id") REFERENCES fabric_types ("fabric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Processing, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, vendor, customer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Subscription status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount of the refund */,
  "refund_method" TEXT /* Method of refund (e.g., Bank transfer, Store credit) */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "return_reason_detail" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment about the item */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the fit of the item (1 to 5 stars) */,
  "value_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the value for money (1 to 5 stars) */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the quality of the item (1 to 5 stars) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the item in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor user */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size that the vendor can edit */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the vendor has edit permissions */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vendor last accessed the system */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_access_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_access_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
